title: Elysium Spa Bubblegum Scented Unicorn Bath Dust
features: BATHTIME MAGIC: Elysium Spa Unicorn Bath Dust adds fizzy, bubblegum scented fun at bathtime. Simply sprinkle into the bath and watch it gently fizz, releasing the juicy bubblegum scent.

100 PercentNATURAL: Elysium Spa Epsom Salt is magnesium sulphate, a pure mineral compound with a variety of uses. Generations of people have relied on its natural values, as it absorbs through the skin's surface to gently help support the removal of toxins.
SOOTHE & RELAX: Perfect for those with an extremely active lifestyle. Helping you soothe all those aches and pains that come with it.

GROWN UPS INDULGE: Not just for children! Add some scented magic to the end of your day, adding Unicorn Dust epsom salts to a bath will help the relaxation of the body and mind to promote a restful night's sleep.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use, resealable bag 400g
description: Product Description Elysium Spa Unicorn Bath Dust adds fizzy, bubblegum scented fun at bathtime. Simply sprinkle into the bath and watch it gently fizz, releasing the juicy bubblegum scent. All the benefits of our popular Elysium Spa Epsom Salts in an easy to use bath dust. Not just for children! Add some scented magic to the end of your day, adding Unicorn Dust epsom salts to a bath will help the relaxation of the body and mind to promote a restful night's sleep. Ready to use resealable bag 400g. Directions Sprinkle the Elysium Spa Unicorn Bath Dust into the bath, allowing it to gently fizz and release the bubblegum scent. Safety Warning May cause skin irritation or allergic reactions. Avoid contact with eyes. Do not ingest. Keep out of reach of children. Use in a well-ventilated area. See more
